content.en:
The Sacred Technique of Leaving the Dust Golden Light requires the Separation of Dust Golden Beads to be practiced, and Ye Tian first comprehended the Sacred Technique of Leaving the Dust Golden Light, and then used the Separation of Dust Golden Beads after the comprehension was thorough.

Leaving the thirteen extreme extreme paths involved in the dust gold bead, Ye Tian found that he was only missing one extreme extreme path, and the other twelve extreme extreme paths had already been comprehended.

Therefore, it would not be long before he could complete the cultivation of the thirteen extreme extreme paths of the Dust Golden Bead.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to completely understand the golden light from the dust, and cultivation was not a problem.

Subsequently, it took him another period of time to comprehend the missing Extreme Extreme Path, and it was inscribed on the Pagoda of Will as the one hundred and ninth Extreme Extreme Path.

this day.

Ye Tian took out a gold bead from the dust.

Naturally, this is not really a dust gold bead, but a dust gold bead copied by Ye Tian.

Such a dust separation gold bead naturally could not help Ye Tian practice into a dust separation golden light, but except for the fact that this dust separation gold bead was copied, the other strength and internal structure were exactly the same.

He could completely comprehend the power inside the Dust Separation Golden Bead, as well as use this Dust Separation Golden Bead to cultivate the Dust Separation Golden Light for the initial effect, so as to continuously deduce and ensure the success rate.

Other people don't dare to do this, it's not necessary, because in this way, it will also waste the gold beads from the dust, so why not just use it to practice?

Therefore, this is the way that only Ye Tiancai can do.

The years passed.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the power inside the Dust Separation Golden Bead, so that the energy of this Dust Separation Golden Light continued to consume, and then he also swallowed this Separation Dust Golden Bead into his stomach and began to cultivate the Separation Dust Golden Light.

When you don't destroy this Dust Gold Bead, this Dust Gold Bead will not dissipate, but if you destroy it a little, it will dissipate, after all, it is just a copied item.

Click!

Gone from the dust and gold!

"Let's go ahead and copy one!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's a waste, but just a little bit more successful is fine.

In this way, the long years passed, and in the blink of an eye, more than three hundred years of the Origin Era had passed.

At this time.

After Ye Tian consumed the resources of the Land of Separation from the Dust, the Pagoda of Will had reached the one hundred and ninety-eighth floor, and now he had comprehended more than a dozen extreme paths.

It's a pity that the resources are exhausted again.

During this period of time, he copied a large number of Dust Gold Beads, and his understanding and perception of Dust Gold Beads far exceeded those of other ancestors.

However, he still didn't dare to guarantee that he could 100% succeed in cultivating into the Dust Separation Golden Light, after all, he had not really tried to cultivate the Dust Separation Golden Light.

"It's useless to continue to copy the Dust Gold Bead, I only have a success rate of close to fifty percent at most!" Ye Tian muttered.

The success rate of fifty percent is actually very high, and if other ancestors use the dust gold bead for the first time, the success rate is estimated to be only one percent!

However, even if the success rate is very low, it only needs one Dust Gold Bead, and like the Nine Yang Sword Light, it requires nine kinds of treasures, including the Sunset Orb, which is too difficult to collect.

Although the glazed holy cover only needs one thing in the river basin, the river basin is too rare, and there is no way to sell it, once it is found, it will be gone.

And the treasure of the Dust Gold Bead can still be traded on some occasions!

Therefore, each sacred art has its own advantages and disadvantages.

"Don't wait, let's just start cultivating the golden light from the dust!"

Ye Tian decided.

So, he took out the real Dust Separation Golden Bead, and then began to cultivate the Dust Separation Golden Light.

"I hope I can succeed, after all, I am a real gold pearl from the dust!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian directly swallowed the Dust Separation Golden Bead, and then urged the power of the thirteen extreme extreme paths to absorb the power of the Dust Separation Golden Bead, and practiced according to the holy art of Separation Dust Golden Light, forming the Dust Separation Golden Light Mark in his body.

As long as the imprint is successfully inscribed, it means that the practice has been completed.

At the beginning, everything went well, but in the back, Ye Tian had to practice extremely carefully, and the way of deduction worked hard, and there was no guarantee that the next step was correct.

However, his luck was still good, and there were still no mistakes.

Finally, the last moment came.

If you make a mark, then you will succeed.

If the imprint condensation fails, then this golden bead from the dust will be wasted.

In a flash.

The last light released by the Dust Golden Bead finally turned into a mark and merged into Ye Tian's body.

The mark is made!

"Whew, it's finally done!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

If others knew that he had successfully cultivated the Dust Separation Golden Light by relying only on a dust gold bead, I am afraid that they would be directly dumbfounded.

"Try the power of the golden light from the dust!"

Ye Tian came to the Primordial Black Sea, and the copy body and the will clone stood in two places.

Immediately, he directly cast the golden light of the dust to attack his will clone.

Click!

Ye Tian's will clone was directly pierced, and the will clone couldn't cast the glazed holy cover, so it couldn't bear the golden light from the dust at all, and any defensive means were useless.

However, Ye Tian's own strength was very terrifying, comparable to the not weak Quadruple Ancestor, so even if the will clone was pierced, he still did not die.

After three attacks, the clone of the will fell.

"It's okay, if it's an ordinary Triple Ancestor, even if he has the golden light from the dust, he can't instantly kill a powerful Quadruple Ancestor, and if his own strength is not good, he will still be killed by others in seconds. But if you kill the weaker Quadruple Ancestor, the golden light from the dust is enough to kill the other party in an instant!" Ye Tian muttered.

There is a limit to the power of sacred arts, and it cannot grow, but the Triple Ancestor is unable to exert the limits of holy arts.

For example, the holy art of Leaving the Dust Golden Light, the holy power it contains is 100, while the Triple Ancestor may only consume 1 point of holy magic power, and cannot exert the full power of holy art.

If you grow to the realm of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, you can burst out 100 points of Holy Technique power at one time, in that case, although the Holy Technique can only be performed once, and the power will be exhausted at one time, but the power is very terrifying, enough to instantly kill the powerful Quadruple Ancestor.

"Only after reaching the top fourfold ancestor, the general holy art is not so important, but the top holy art is definitely very useful!

Ye Tian muttered.

What is the Top-Notch Sacred Arts?

The Jiuyang Sword Light is a top-notch holy art, and it is of great use to any fourfold primordial ancestor, and only the fifth-fold primordial ancestor can't look down on the top-notch holy art.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian tested the effect of the collision between the Dust Golden Light and the Glass Holy Cover, and the result was that the Dust Golden Light could not penetrate the Glass Holy Cover, even if the power of the Holy Art was exhausted, it did not penetrate the Glass Holy Cover.

"It seems that the glazed holy cover is still better than the golden light from the dust, and the grade is a little higher!"

Ye Tian muttered.
